title: Qreate
description: A Quilt based, kitchen sink modpack revolving around Create
body:
### Qreate is a kitchen sink mod pack that has something for everyone!
**Create a Flawless Factory** to produce ~~100,000 Cakes/Minute~~ anything you can imagine! Using [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) to automate anything you can think of, [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) for all your storage needs, and [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) for tons of machine-plants to fill in the gaps. **Explore a Vibrant World** thanks to [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/8oi3bsk5), [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZVzW5oNS) and [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/LPjGiSO4). Fight your way through vast dungeons with [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), or even travel to other worlds entirely with [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra). **Increased Quality of Life** with simple but meaningful mods like [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones), [Tempad](https://modrinth.com/mod/tempad), [Simple Backpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-backpack-fabric), and [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on). Minecraft is meant to be fun, not a slog through outdated mechanics. **Do it all with Great FPS** on the modern [Quilt mod loader](https://quiltmc.org/en/), and boosted further by preformance overhaul mods like [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) and [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium). Never worry about Optifine's quirks again. You can even have your cake and eat it too with [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - no more choosing between shaders and fps! --- A complete [list of mods](https://codeberg.org/qreate/qreate-modpack/src/branch/1.20.1/dev/modlist.md) is available on qreate's Codeberg repository. For custom datapacks and recommended configurations, check out the "[qreate-server](https://codeberg.org/qreate/qreate-server)" repository Questing with [Heracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/heracles) will be included in the upcoming 1.20.1 **stable** update!
